finding.triage_reasoning: Reality gap does not exist. `AuditIssue` is used in 8 places inside `audit.py` itself — as the type annotation of the `issues` list in `AuditResult`, and in 6 `issues.append(AuditIssue(...))` call sites in `run_audit`. Internal usage within the declaring module is genuine liveness; the absence of cross-file imports does not make it dead. `AuditResult` (which holds `list[AuditIssue]`) is exported as the return type of public functions, transitively making `AuditIssue` reachable.
